question: Which component renders an individual post in the main app, and where is it defined?
expected_answer: Post, defined in src/view/com/post/Post.tsx (lines 44-98). (A separate embed-widget Post exists in bskyembed/src/components/post.tsx.)

question: Which component renders the BottomBar (the bottom tab bar)?
expected_answer: TabsNavigator in src/Navigation.tsx renders BottomBar (defined in src/view/shell/bottom-bar/BottomBar.tsx).

question: Where is the post composer (ComposePost) implemented, and which shell components render it?
expected_answer: ComposePost in src/view/com/composer/Composer.tsx (lines 252-1555), rendered by the platform Composer shells: src/view/shell/Composer.ios.tsx, src/view/shell/Composer.tsx, and src/view/shell/Composer.web.tsx.

question: Does the app have a reusable error boundary component? Where is it defined?
expected_answer: Yes -- ErrorBoundary in src/view/com/util/ErrorBoundary.tsx (lines 21-50), rendered by several shell/screen components.

question: Which hook handles incoming push notifications, and which other hooks does it call to do its job?
expected_answer: useNotificationsHandler in src/lib/hooks/useNotificationHandler.ts (lines 108-427); it calls useSession, useAccountSwitcher, useCurrentConvoId, useNavigation and react-query's useQueryClient among others.

question: Which screen shows the user's saved feeds?
Is there a screen for viewing the app's internal system log? Where is it defined?
What is the useInitialNumToRender hook for, and roughly how widely is it used across the app?
expected_answer: A list-rendering helper in src/lib/hooks/useInitialNumToRender.ts that computes the initial number of list items to render; it is called by ~18 components/screens (e.g. LikedByList, BookmarksInner, HashtagScreenTab, TopicScreenTab).

question: Are there any class-based components in the codebase? Name one and where it is defined.
expected_answer: Yes, a few -- e.g. GifView, a class component defined in modules/expo-bluesky-gif-view/src/GifView.tsx (with a .web variant), and BottomSheetNativeComponent in modules/bottom-sheet/src/BottomSheetNativeComponent.tsx.

question: What does the file src/view/com/post/Post.tsx depend on for opening the composer and for post-state caching?
expected_answer: It depends on lib/hooks/useOpenComposer (opening the composer) and state/cache/post-shadow (post-state caching), among other imports.
